name: Potato and Bacon Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Russet potatoes, peeled and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 13-inch glass baking dish.
3. Cook bacon and onion until the bacon is crisp. Drain well.
4. Combine eggs with potatoes and cheese. Mix in bacon.
5. Pour evenly into baking dish.
6. Bake for about 45 minutes or until center is set. Serves 6 to 8.
